title: GraphQL API with Next.js
description: Build a type-safe GraphQL API in Next.js using Apollo Server 4, Drizzle ORM, Zod input validation, Auth.js for authentication, and deploy to Vercel.

steps.description: Initialize a Next.js project with TypeScript and App Router
Set up Drizzle ORM with your database (Neon, Supabase, or Turso)
Install Apollo Server 4, define schema and resolvers, wire up the /api/graphql route
Add Zod schemas for validating GraphQL mutation inputs in resolvers
Add Auth.js for session-based authentication; attach session to Apollo context
Write unit tests for resolvers using Vitest
Configure CI to run tests and type-check on every push
Deploy to Vercel — GraphQL route works as a serverless function automatically
